evidence_quotes.quote: Significant considerations must be given to the gaming industry and the associated practices regarding the sale and upkeep of digital and physical video games.

paragraphs.text: Significant considerations must be given to the gaming industry and the associated practices regarding the sale and upkeep of digital and physical video games. The Stop Destroying Videogames EU citizens initiative aims to tackle the unfair practices associated with video games and their abandonment by companies once they are no longer viable. Adequate legislation should be levied to allow consumers of video games to retain and be able to utilize their purchase. https://eci.ec.europa.eu/045/public/#/screen/home
